---
title: "Appendix 2: All Tables - Paper 2 (Ideological Commitment Signaling)"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    theme: cosmo
  pdf:
    documentclass: report
    classoption: [a4paper, 12pt]
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    fig-cap-location: top
    tbl-cap-location: top
---

```{r}
#| label: setup-appendix2
#| include: false

library(here)
here::i_am("quarto/appendix2.qmd")
setwd(here::here())

library(knitr)
options(knitr.kable.NA = "")
```
```{r}
#| label: all-tables
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

table_files <- list.files(here("results/tables"), pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)

for (f in sort(table_files)) {
  basename <- basename(f)
  cat("###", basename, "\n\n")
  
  tbl <- read.csv(f)
  print(kable(tbl, digits = 3, booktabs = TRUE))
  
  cat("\n\n")
}
```
